text.title: AWS CLI Containers Databases IaC Identity Monitoring Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the AWS CLI Containers Databases IaC Identity Monitoring methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: select-operation
step.action: Pick ECS / EKS / RDS / CFN / IAM / CloudWatch command sequence.

step.name: draft-rollback
step.action: Per mutation, draft rollback command sequence.
step.decision-gate: Rollback that requires manual intervention flagged for review.
